decisions.decision: UI-SPEC approved with typography fix (removed 28px/12px/500-weight outliers, collapsed to 3-size scale)
Quasar QStepper + existing stage pattern (VocabularyStage/GrammarStage/ListeningStage) is the reference for SpeakingStage and WritingStage

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase to create PLAN.md for phase 15 (SpeakingStage, WritingStage, PlacementResults screen)
context_notes: Phase 15 UI-SPEC is fully approved. No implementation has started. The phase covers: SpeakingStage (mic recording + TTS playback), WritingStage (text input + prompt), and PlacementResults page (CEFR badge + per-skill breakdown). All three feed into the existing OnboardingPage QStepper after the Listening stage.
